title: T-023 — UI: RPT-EXPORTS history page + RPT-SAVED saved-filter page (12-REPORTING §15.2)
prompt:
# T-023 — Export history + saved filters pages

PRD: docs/prd/12-REPORTING-PRD.md §15.2 RPT-EXPORTS + RPT-SAVED, §14.1 (7-year retention display)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototypes:
- RPT-EXPORTS: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/reporting/other-screens.jsx:4-86 (`rpt_exports_history`)
- RPT-SAVED: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/reporting/other-screens.jsx:89-156 (`rpt_saved_filters`)
UX: prototypes/design/12-REPORTING-UX.md:627-664 + :666-692

## Goal
Two Server Component pages:
- `/reporting/exports` — user's export history (report_exports T-004) with 7-year retention enforced via WHERE clause; Download button (presigned URL via T-013 get-export-status); 'Error details' → opens error_log_modal (RPT-014, T-024); SHA-256 displayed truncated with full hash in tooltip.
- `/reporting/saved-views` — saved_filter_presets (T-008) list with Apply / Edit / Delete actions; Empty-state when no presets; visibility badges (team / just_me).

## Prototype parity
- RPT-EXPORTS: WHERE user_id = session.user.id AND deleted_at IS NULL AND created_at > NOW() - '7 years'::interval; FmtBadge per format; archived rows route to cold storage retrieval Server Action.
- RPT-SAVED: canManage = role in (Manager, Admin) checked server-side; Apply → router.push(preset.dashboard_url + '?' + filter_params); Edit → save_preset_modal (T-026); Delete → delete_confirm_modal (T-024).

## Implementation contract
1. `/reporting/exports/page.tsx` (RSC) — reads report_exports for current user with retention WHERE clause; passes data to client.
2. `/reporting/saved-views/page.tsx` (RSC) — reads saved_filter_presets with WHERE (created_by=session OR visibility='team') AND site_id matches.
3. Cross-component glue: RPT-EXPORTS Error button opens RPT-014 modal (T-024); RPT-SAVED Edit/Delete open T-024 modals.
4. Empty / loading / error / permission states; RTL + Playwright parity for BOTH pages.
5. next-intl `reporting.{exports,saved}.*` keys.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(reporting)/exports/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(reporting)/exports/_components/exports-history-client.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(reporting)/exports/__tests__/exports-history.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(reporting)/saved-views/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(reporting)/saved-views/_components/saved-views-client.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(reporting)/saved-views/__tests__/saved-views.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/messages/{en,pl}/reporting-other-screens.json [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given report_exports for user_A has 10 rows in last 7 years and 1 row 8 years old, when /reporting/exports renders, then 10 rows display (8-year-old excluded by retention WHERE).
2. Given user_A is viewing their own exports, when user_B is the actual session user, then user_A's rows are NOT visible (cross-user isolation; WHERE user_id = session.user.id).
3. Given an export row format='pdf', when SHA-256 cell renders, then it shows truncated hash (first 16 chars + '…') with full hash in title/tooltip.
4. Given /reporting/saved-views user has 3 just_me presets and 2 team presets, when page renders for non-Manager, then just_me presets visible (own only) + team presets visible; Edit/Delete buttons disabled for non-Manager.
5. Given Apply is clicked on a preset, when navigation occurs, then router.push(preset.dashboard_url + '?' + URLSearchParams from filter_params).
6. Given no presets exist, when /reporting/saved-views renders, then EmptyState component shown with create-CTA.
7. UI parity for BOTH pages + 4 states + next-intl wrapping.

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: RTL for both pages incl. retention WHERE + cross-user isolation + Apply navigation + EmptyState + Manager-only Edit/Delete.
- Playwright parity per prototype.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web test exports-history saved-views && pnpm --filter @monopilot/web playwright test reporting-other`.
- GREEN: build pages + clients.

## Risk red lines
- Do not query report_exports without WHERE user_id = session AND retention_until > now() — cross-user leak risk + retention compliance.
- Do not show full SHA-256 inline — truncate per prototype.
- Do not allow Edit/Delete for non-Manager — server-side RBAC gate.
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim.
- Do not skip next-intl wrapping.
- Do not skip 4 states for either page.
- Do not let Apply navigation accept raw preset.dashboard_url — server-side validate against dashboards_catalog routes whitelist.

pipeline_inputs.description: RPT-EXPORTS history + RPT-SAVED saved-filter pages. 7-year retention + cross-user isolation + Manager-only Edit/Delete RBAC.
pipeline_inputs.details: Reads T-004 report_exports + T-008 saved_filter_presets. Both pages reuse modals (RPT-014, RPT-017, RPT-018) from T-024 / T-026. EmptyState pattern on RPT-SAVED.
out_of_scope: Do not implement RPT-SCHED / RPT-SCHED-EDIT (P2 T-025)
Do not implement modal components here (T-024 / T-026)
acceptance_criteria: Given the production implementation is reviewed for parity, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/reporting/other-screens.jsx:4-86; prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/reporting/other-screens.jsx:89-156, then visual structure, shadcn primitives, interaction states, and Tailwind tokens match; Playwright trace + screenshot artifacts attached per _meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md (rpt_exports_history + rpt_saved_filters).
Given report_exports for user_A has 10 rows in last 7 years and 1 row 8 years old, when /reporting/exports renders, then 10 rows display (8-year-old excluded by retention WHERE)
Given user_A is viewing their own exports, when user_B is the actual session user, then user_A's rows are NOT visible (cross-user isolation)

Given the page/modal is exercised end-to-end, when closeout criteria are verified, then empty/loading/error/permission states are rendered per UI parity policy with Playwright trace + screenshot artifacts attached; all visible strings route through next-intl keys (no hardcoded labels).
